title: How to teach the same skill to different robots
title_zh: 如何将同一技能传授给不同机器人
abstract: The assembly line task setup. Credit: 2026 LASA EPFL CC-BY-SA. By Celia Luterbacher In today’s manufacturing environments, upgrading a robot fleet often means starting from scratch – not only replacing hardware, but also reprogramming tasks. Even when two robots are built to perform similar jobs, different joint arrangements or movement limits mean that a task […]
abstract_zh: 在当今的制造环境中，升级机器人车队通常意味着从头开始——不仅要更换硬件，还要重新编程任务。即使两个机器人被设计执行类似的工作，不同的关节配置或运动限制意味着一个任务……
tldr_zh: 提出一种跨不同机器人平台迁移技能的方法。
cover_zh: 换机器人就要重写程序？这个新方法让技能一键迁移

score_breakdown.label: 关键词命中密集
score_breakdown.hint: 频道关键词命中 1 个（assembly）

judge.reason: 缺乏具体算法创新，偏向工业应用新闻，科研价值低
